summary: Phase 1 is a data-processing phase with no user-facing UI. All assertions are data-validation assertions that were verified via content validation script (npm run validate:content).

notes.assertionType: All Phase 1 assertions validate JSON data files (structure, content, cross-references), not UI behavior.
notes.validationResults: 611 assertions passed via npm run validate:content
notes.appState: App has placeholder UI pages with 'Coming Soon' text. Data files exist but are not yet integrated into UI.
